issues.title: Enemy dealt 33 dmg (87% of 38 HP) on floor 3 enc 2
issues.description: On floor 3, encounter 2, turn 9 (seq 233), the enemy dealt 33 damage which is 87% of the player's 38 HP before the hit. This exceeds the 50% threshold for a single enemy turn.
issues.suggestedFix: Consider reducing enemy damage scaling or adding damage caps for this enemy type.

issues.title: Enemy dealt 22 dmg (100% of 22 HP) on floor 3 enc 2
issues.description: On floor 3, encounter 2, turn 10 (seq 237), the enemy dealt 22 damage which is 100% of the player's 22 HP before the hit. This exceeds the 50% threshold for a single enemy turn.
issues.suggestedFix: Consider reducing enemy damage scaling or adding damage caps for this enemy type.

issues.title: 3 consecutive easy encounters (floors 1-1): HP stayed above 90
issues.description: 3 consecutive encounters where player ended with HP > 90. Encounters: F1E0:98HP, F1E1:100HP, F1E2:91HP. The game may not be challenging enough in this stretch.
issues.suggestedFix: Increase enemy damage or reduce healing on early floors.

issues.title: Player defeated on floor 3, encounter 2 by knowledge_golem (boss)
issues.description: Player was defeated on floor 3, encounter 2 against knowledge_golem (boss). Accuracy was 63% over 10 turns. They dealt 64 damage and took 176 damage. Early defeat suggests difficulty may be too high for this profile.
issues.suggestedFix: Consider reducing boss HP or damage for early floors.

issues.title: Player defeated despite 73% accuracy: attrition death
issues.description: The player was defeated on floor 3 with an overall accuracy of 73%. High-accuracy players should have a fair chance of survival; this suggests the damage/healing balance is too punishing.
issues.suggestedFix: Reduce enemy damage scaling or increase healing from correct answers.

issues.title: Floor 2 enc 2: 18 turns vs prev floor avg 2.7 (6.8x)
issues.description: Encounter 2 on floor 2 (enemy: stone_sentinel, mini_boss) took 18 turns to resolve, which is 6.8x the previous floor's average of 2.7 turns. This exceeds the 2x threshold and indicates a difficulty spike.
issues.suggestedFix: Smooth difficulty curve between floors or reduce this enemy's HP/damage.

issues.title: HP dropped from 100 to 5 in floor 3 encounter 2
issues.description: During floor 3, encounter 2, player HP dropped from 100 to 5. Going from >70 to <20 in one encounter feels punishing and unfun.
issues.suggestedFix: Add damage caps per encounter or provide emergency healing at low HP.
